batch_summary.dominant_tone: cooperative/administrative with four Sev-1 RF-04 clusters; no Sev-2 events
batch_summary.rf04_activity: low-moderate — 4 primary flags, all Sev-1; batch otherwise cooperative
batch_summary.notable_context: Cat dander/Tahko death allergy dispute (Mar 31 – Apr 1). Solar eclipse (Apr 8). ROW-4949 adult-language child relay ('what the fuck is he going on about?'). Olivia's 6 cavities (Apr 9). Finding Nemo school choir (Apr 24-25 — cooperative). Payment disputes (court-ordered daycare + $1k). Milo's birthday visit (May 4). May 8 tornado warnings (cooperative). Cat allergy restriction on Olivia visits to Eli's house ongoing (Tahko died Apr 1; 6-month dander claim asserted). ROW-4990-4993 (Apr 8) child emotional relay 'Your daughter is upset that you hung up on her.'

primary_flags.summary: Mar 31 cat allergy blame cluster. Context: Melissa initiated a comparison framing — Eli said he couldn't attend church due to flower allergen exposure; Melissa deploys this to attack his cat-dander handling. ROW-4906: 'You're like I can't go to church and unnecessarily expose myself to allergens with flowers but you were fine exposing her to cat dander' — false equivalence + contemptuous framing. ROW-4909: 'You didn't respect her allergies. You agreed to things then didn't do them. You took her into your house with the cats and made no...' — false character attribution: agreement-reneging + negligence framing. ROW-4910: 'I had to have my lawyer send you a letter to get you to stop subjecting her to them' — lawyer-letter framing positions Eli as so negligent he required legal compulsion to protect his own child. ROW-4911: 'You were fine subjecting her to it even though she needed her inhaler. Didn't stop until my lawyer sent you a letter' — repetition reinforces inadequate-father narrative. ROW-4912-4913: Eli declines to argue ('Ok.' / 'I am not going to argue with you.'). ROW-4914: 'Cause you know I'm right' — contemptuous dismissal; Eli's refusal to engage reframed as admission of guilt. Structure: sustained inadequate-father attack via historical medical grievance → contemptuous dismissal of Eli's boundary as proof of his guilt. ARC-RF04-001-S35.
verbatim_key_messages: ROW-4906 (Received): "You're like I can't go to church and unnecessarily expose myself to allergens with flowers but you were fine exposing her to cat dander"
ROW-4909 (Received): "You didn't respect her allergies.  You agreed to things then didn't do them. You took her into your house with the cats and made no..."
ROW-4910 (Received): "You didn't respect her allergies. I had to have my lawyer send you a letter to get you to stop subjecting her to them"
ROW-4911 (Received): "You were fine subjecting her to it even though she needed her inhaler. Didn't stop until my lawyer sent you a letter"
ROW-4913 (Sent): "I am not going to argue with you."

primary_flags.summary: ROW-4966: 'Thanks for getting back with me about picking her up, asshat' — contemptuous slur deployed when Eli did not respond to pickup time inquiries (ROW-4963: 'Are you picking her up tonight or not'; ROW-4965: 'Are you picking her up at 5:30 or not'). Context: Eli had communicated he was on back-to-back calls until 3pm (ROW-4964). By ROW-4967, Eli explains he had to stay out of area anyway and couldn't have picked her up regardless. 'Asshat' is ADD-002 contemptuous labeling pattern — same family as 'dumbass' (×4), 'worthless dick,' 'bitch what'; deployed against Eli's communication gap with no acknowledgment of his earlier explanation of calls. ARC-RF04-001-S36.
verbatim_key_messages: ROW-4964 (Sent): "On calls for the next couple of hours - I have back to back calls until 3"
ROW-4966 (Received): "Thanks for getting back with me about picking her up, asshat"

primary_flags.summary: 7th predation framing deployment. ROW-5126: 'Abby preggers?' — inserted without contextual transition after ROW-5122-5125 (casual pleasant conversation: steak preferences, Olivia thumb-up relay). The pregnancy query implies Abby is carrying Eli's child, reinforcing the ongoing-sexual-relationship-with-niece narrative. Mechanism: covert/suggestive (same class as ROW-3240 B-009 'Abby pregnant or just fat?') rather than explicit ('banging your niece'). Prior instances: ROW-937-938 (B-003), ROW-1287 (B-004), ROW-2167/2173 (B-006), ROW-3271 (B-009), ROW-3388 (B-010), ROW-4093 (B-012 — marriage scenario). RF-15 cross-tag. Pattern note: 7 confirmed deployments across 7 batches; pregnancy framing now confirmed as second covert deployment mechanism alongside marriage-scenario framing. ARC-RF04-001-S37. COMP-RF04-013 (RF-04+RF-15).
verbatim_key_messages: ROW-5125 (Received): "Well done like her mom does"

primary_flags.summary: May 8 contemptuous dismissal cascade. Context: Eli raises a legitimate parenting concern — Olivia was impersonating a YouTube character and Eli expressed that she gets worse when Melissa laughs/eggs her on (ROW-5206: 'I notice that she gets worse the more you laugh - quit egging her on, please. She is going to...'). Melissa's response: ROW-5205: 'Calm down cupcake' — condescending pet-name dismissal of Eli's parenting input. ROW-5207: 'What are you going on about?' — contemptuous reframing of Eli's concern as incoherent. ROW-5209: 'You are waaaaay too sensitive.' — contemptuous dismissal of Eli's parenting concern as emotional over-reaction. ROW-5212: 'Y are you so sensitive?' — repeated contemptuous dismissal. Structure: Eli raises specific parenting concern (behavior pattern) → 'calm down cupcake' + 'what are you going on about' + 'waaaaay too sensitive' ×2 — four-message dismissal cascade that deploys condescension, incoherence-framing, and sensitivity-pathologizing to extinguish Eli's parenting input without engagement. ARC-RF04-001-S38.
verbatim_key_messages: ROW-5206 (Sent): "I notice that she gets worse the more you laugh - quit egging her on, please.  She is going to..."
ROW-5207 (Received): "What are you going on about?"

peripheral_flags.note: ROW-4949: 'Ahe said "what the fuck is he going on about? He hasn't called me"' — Melissa relays Olivia's alleged statement using adult profanity to cast Eli as confused/wrong about whether he called. RF-11 cross-tag (adult language attributed to child). ARC-RF04-002 peripheral — child's voice deployed to undercut Eli's factual account.

ROW-4990: 'Your daughter is upset that you hung up on her' — child emotional relay as inadequate-father lever. ROW-4993: 'She said you hung up' — reaffirmation of child's alleged accusation. Eli denies hanging up (ROW-4991-4992). Mild ARC-RF04-002 pattern; no escalation. ARC-RF04-002-S11 (peripheral-level).

ROW-5184: 'You're unreliable' — contemptuous character jab delivered after Eli explains he cannot afford plane tickets for a trip due to car breakdown. Brief; no escalation. Inadequate-father framing deployed against financial constraint.

new_signals.summary: Mar 31 allergen-blame inadequate-father sustained attack. 'You didn't respect her allergies / I had to have my lawyer send you a letter' + 'Cause you know I'm right' contemptuous dismissal of Eli's refusal to argue.
'Thanks for getting back with me about picking her up, asshat' — ADD-002 contemptuous slur when Eli didn't respond during stated call period.
'Abby preggers?' — 7th predation framing; covert pregnancy-implies-relationship mechanism; mid-stream casual conversation insertion. COMP-RF04-013 (RF-04+RF-15).

May 8 contemptuous dismissal cascade: 'Calm down cupcake' + 'What are you going on about?' + 'You are waaaaay too sensitive.' + 'Y are you so sensitive?' — four-message dismissal of Eli's parenting concern as incoherent/hypersensitive.

'Your daughter is upset that you hung up on her' — mild child-relay inadequate-father guilt lever; ARC-RF04-002 peripheral-level signal. Eli denies hanging up; Melissa reaffirms child's accusation without resolution.

compound_patterns.summary: Thirteenth compound multi-RF episode. RF-04 (7th predation framing — 'Abby preggers?' covert pregnancy mechanism, ARC-RF04-001-S37) + RF-15 (pregnancy query implies ongoing sexual relationship with niece). Covert deployment mechanism: casual-context pregnancy inquiry without explicit allegation language. Pattern: 7 confirmed predation-framing deployments across 7 batches; covert mechanisms now confirmed alongside explicit mechanisms.

cp3_item.summary: ROW-5126 (Apr 28 B-014) — 7th predation framing 'Abby preggers?' covert pregnancy mechanism; COMP-RF04-013 (RF-04+RF-15); ARC-RF04-001-S37. Predation framing pattern now spans 7 batches (B-003, B-004, B-006, B-009, B-010, B-012, B-014) with two confirmed covert mechanisms (pregnancy framing, marriage-scenario framing) and two explicit mechanisms. Notable also: ROW-4906-4914 (Mar 31) allergen-blame inadequate-father attack + 'Cause you know I'm right' contemptuous dismissal; ROW-5201-5212 (May 8) 'Calm down cupcake' / 'waaaaay too sensitive' ×2 parenting-concern dismissal cascade.
